reviews.comment:
Excelente todo, el acceso para cargar combustible, la atención de los playeros, dentro del servicompras también, todo bárbaro  y ni hablar de la oficina del ACA, la atención de Ludmila es fuera de serie, siempre amable, tratando de buscar la mejor solución a cada inquietud o problema, todo muy bien explicado y siempre de buen ánimo, la verdad qué súper conforme, mis felicitaciones a Ludmila y todo el personal de esa estación

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent, the access to fill up the fuel tank, the attention of the beach attendants, inside the service station as well, everything was great and not to mention the ACA office, Ludmila's attention is outstanding, always friendly, trying to find the best solution to every concern or problem, everything was very well explained and always in good spirits, the truth is that I am super satisfied, my congratulations to Ludmila and all the staff at that station
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtemZHN0x3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños son un asco y la tradición de a principio de mes cortar las líneas de pago digital y crédito, lo hacen ser lo peor de la zona. Se debe a que quiere  efectivo a principio de mes, y hace esa maniobra que se puede divisar mensualmente

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are disgusting, and the tradition of cutting off digital payment and credit lines at the beginning of the month makes it the worst in the area. This is because they want cash at the start of the month, and this tactic is noticeable every month.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMGMtdkZREAE

reviews.comment:
Buenas tardes lo que me sucedió es que había una cola que llegaba a la calle, no estaban atendiendo porque supuestamente estaban bajando un camión y resulta que el chófer venía cruzando la calle los playeros adentro del Nochero y cuando comienzan atender habilitan una sola cara de un surtidor por lo cual seguíamos haciendo cola... La atención aceptable una vez que nos atendieron pero esperamos 20min.
Gracias por la respuesta

(Translated by Google)
Good afternoon. What happened to me was that there was a line that stretched out into the street. They weren't serving customers because they were supposedly unloading a truck, but it turned out the driver was crossing the street. The gas station attendants were inside the Nochero station, and when they finally started serving customers, they only opened one side of the pump, so we were still in line. The service was acceptable once we were finally served, but we waited 20 minutes.

Thank you for your response.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtLXRDbUhREAE
